description_long: This is a large, two-story white house set on a rectangular green lawn, surrounded by several tall palm trees. The house features a mix of flat and slightly sloped roof sections, with multiple large windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The front includes a rounded driveway and a prominent entryway with columns, while the rear opens to a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and landscaped elements. The structure is composed of clean, modern lines with subtle classical influences, such as arched windows and a columned porch. The exterior is predominantly white, with some beige and tan accents on the patio and driveway. The overall setting suggests a luxurious, Mediterranean-inspired residence suitable for upscale urban or suburban neighborhoods.
description: A large, white two-story house with palm trees, a columned entryway, and a backyard pool on a green lawn. The design blends modern and Mediterranean elements with spacious outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, rounded driveway, and several palm trees framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive patio, swimming pool, lounge chairs, and dense palm tree arrangement.
description_view_3: Angled side-rear view showing the pool, patio, landscaping, and the architectural details of the house's rear and side facades.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Columned main entry with arched doorway, steps, and a rounded driveway
